case_title: JOHNSON, ERNEST VICTOR VS KUN, ALBERT (ATTORNEY)

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO ATTY ALBERT KUN RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ERNEST VICTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUN, ALBERT (ATTORNEY) $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,020.00, DEFT UNABLE TO PROVE DAMAGES RE LOSS OF CREDIT BY THE PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT KUN, ALBERT (ATTORNEY)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23556, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, ERNEST VICTOR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KUN, ALBERT (ATTORNEY) JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23556 ON 12-21-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY JOHNSON, ERNEST VICTOR AS TO DEFENDANT KUN, ALBERT (ATTORNEY) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-13-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
